project-oneliner-spanish: A security gate for AI coding agents that blocks risky dependencies, instructions, and source-code changes before they land in the repository.
project-description-spanish: yieldOS is an installable Claude Code plugin that acts as a security layer between AI coding agents and a project. It intercepts package installs, dependency manifest edits, skills, MCPs, vendored code, curl|sh installers, instruction edits, commits, and pushes; then automatically allows, blocks, rewrites, or audits the action based on deterministic policy and evidence. Its code-audit loop red-teams source diffs, applies small deterministic blue-team fixes when safe, can optionally ask the user's local Claude Code or Codex CLI for deeper red-team review and patch proposals without API keys, re-scans, records verifiable audit state, and blocks unresolved high-risk changes before they reach the repo.
